_note: LEGACY/REFUTED DEATH-WRITE PROBE (any target) - HP=0 ALONE. Same as death-test.json but AffectAllies=true so HP=0 can be reproduced on any target. Live evidence proved this creates a zombie-like state, not real KO. Keep only for historical auditing; current custom-formula profiles use MinHpFloor=1 and let the engine own death. If intentionally re-run, use neutered vanilla damage so the byte write is the isolated variable.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (bit found in Test 2a, set on every death)
